meaning: adj.简洁的,警句的,富于格言的,很多(过分)说教式的
examples: Sententious sage! So it is: but I swear by my household gods not to abuse it.
Generally his ideas were expressed in brief sententious phrase, spoken in low voice.
That message, often delivered in sententious, near messianic tones, had little appeal.
On the back of the package you will soon find his sententious statements about exercise.
Much of his early poetry is sententious, a poetry written with designs upon its readers which strives above all to be morally useful.
